_README: Copy this to config.json in YOUR school's classroom repo and fill in real values. One config.json per school repo. The gen-forms Action regenerates the request forms from it on every push. 'student_repo_pattern' is OPTIONAL — omit it and student repos are named {course}-{semester}-{assignment}-{username}. Only set it for a custom scheme, using the {course}/{semester}/{assignment}/{username} placeholders (never hardcode a course name, or copying a course block will collide repos).
